data.summary: Sensei! The “100 Free Recruitment” event is coming back once again! Don’t miss this chance—it might
data.body:
Sensei! The “100 Free Recruitment” event is coming back once again!
Don’t miss this chance—it might be just what you need while waiting for the upcoming recruitments of Seia (Swimsuit) and Hasumi (Swimsuit), starting on Tuesday, December 16!

➡️ More info: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3302497
![G730zW2aEAAyFNv.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/4417/6KPWfsVaHJkKw2UpJrjSUBvRI4NMXdO0.jpg)
